changeSet.author: microfina-phase11
changeSet.comment: Insert ADMIN privilege if missing, and grant it to the ADMIN role
changeSet.sql: IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Privilege WHERE code_privilege = 'ADMIN') INSERT INTO Privilege (code_privilege, libelle, module, version) VALUES ('ADMIN', 'Administration système (jobs, monitoring)', 'ADMIN', 0)

IF NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM RolePrivilege rp INNER JOIN Role r ON r.id = rp.id_role INNER JOIN Privilege p ON p.id = rp.id_privilege WHERE r.code_role = 'ADMIN' AND p.code_privilege = 'ADMIN' ) INSERT INTO RolePrivilege (id_role, id_privilege) SELECT r.id, p.id FROM Role r, Privilege p WHERE r.code_role = 'ADMIN' AND p.code_privilege = 'ADMIN'

rollback.sql: DELETE rp FROM RolePrivilege rp INNER JOIN Privilege p ON p.id = rp.id_privilege WHERE p.code_privilege = 'ADMIN'
